title: Cryptid Sighting Dispatch
text:
## Cryptid Sighting Dispatch

**Alert level:** {adjective}

**Location:** {place} County, mile marker {number}

**Report:** Witness {person} saw a {adjective} {animal} {verb ending in -ing} across the highway at {number} AM.

**Description:** Approximately {number} feet tall, {color} fur, smell of {food}.

**Evidence:** One {object}, {number} blurry photos, and a {adjective} footprint.

**Public guidance:** Do not {verb} alone. Report sightings to the {job} hotline.

**Status:** Search team deployed with {plural noun} and a {adjective} drone.

**Next update:** {day of week} after the mayor finishes {verb ending in -ing}.
